title: PlayerShops
description: This project adds shops that use the classic trading system, instead of using coins, you can easily exchange items with other players.
body:
Welcome to my custom shop mod! I decided to make this mod due to the lack of shop mods that allow trading in Forge version 1.20.1, and it will only be compatible with this version. If you have any ideas, I'm open to hearing them and you can contact me :)



1. /sell (item from your inventory to sell) (amount) (items to recive as payment) (amount)
2. /shop (shop gui)
3. /shopinv (claim your profit from the shop)
 


![shopmenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55ec5043114991f8fb917632e22105092a4df620.png)
